title: Key separation check comment misleads about its coverage
description:
The comment in wallet_init reads:
  'For --no-passphrase mode, perform the check directly.'
  
A contributor reading this thinks: 'the passphrase mode must have its own check somewhere else.' It does not. The check is entirely absent from the passphrase path.

What the comment should say:
  'Key separation check: only performed in --no-passphrase mode to avoid prompting
   for identity passphrase during wallet_init. In passphrase mode, independent entropy
   is the only enforcement — there is no runtime check.'

As-is, a future contributor who adds a 'load identity + wallet together' code path will assume the invariant is enforced elsewhere and not add their own check.
